name: Networking Toolbox
short_description: Collection of 100+ networking utilities - port scanner, IP info, DNS tools, and more.
description: Networking Toolbox bundles 100+ offline networking utilities such as port scanner, IP lookup, DNS checker, traceroute, ping, HTTP header viewer, and SSL certificate inspector. Useful for troubleshooting, verifying configurations, and learning network diagnostics.
usecases: Check your public IP and location info.
